notes: PSA does not publish route-level transit data. This file documents fleet count context data only. No routes are extractable from PSA sources. OD survey data (JICA MUCEP 2015) is separately covered under the JICA aspect.

fleet_counts.source_notes: LTFRB/MMDA operational data; PSA Table 5.8.2 provides LTO registration breakdowns by region but with 2-3 year lag

ridership_context.source: DOTr, MMDA, rail operators via PSA press releases and MMDA reports
